name: Ramon Delgado
personality: Ramon is pragmatic and quiet, preferring a firm handshake over small talk. He knows every regular’s story but keeps his own life locked in the backroom safe.
quirk: He always polishes the same vintage brass scale daily, as if the weight of the world depends on it
voice: 'Listen, kid, you want this, you pay the price—no games.'
daily: Open the shop at 9 am, sift through incoming items, negotiate with locals, and close up after the last customer leaves at 8 pm.
